prestazioni: 4G63T (7-bolt, 85mm bore, 88mm stroke) forged internals upgrade with Tomei 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series main/rod bearings for 1.2mm overbore capacity, paired with a Tomei Type-M 272° camshaft (11.5mm lift) and Tomei adjustable cam gears for optimized overlap on 110-octane fuel

Garrett GT2860-5 turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing, 60mm compressor inducer) with a custom 3-inch divorced wastegate manifold by HKS, mated to a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller and a custom 3.5-inch titanium downpipe with a Burns Stainless 4-inch external wastegate dump

HKS Hi-Power RS 80mm MAF-based standalone ECU with custom ROM tuning for 32psi peak boost on E85 (targeting 450whp at 7,800 RPM), paired with a Tomei 260-lph fuel pump, ID1000x injectors, and a Sard 1,000cc/min top-feed fuel rail with -6AN lines and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Evo III-specific front bumper, overfenders, and rear diffuser) with custom carbon fiber canards and a vented hood by Seibon Carbon, finished in Mitsubishi Racing Rally Blue (MRR Blue) with a 3M 1080 Gloss Black wrap on the roof and mirrors

Volk Racing TE37SL 17x9 +22 front and 17x10 +30 rear wheels in Hyper Silver, shod with Toyo R888R 245/40/17 and 275/35/17 tires, paired with Project Kics R40 6-pot front and 4-pot rear brake calipers with 356mm and 330mm DBA 5000 Series rotors, respectively

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8kg/mm front and 10kg/mm rear springs, custom valving for Evo III’s 5x114.3 bolt pattern, and spherical bearing top mounts, complemented by Cusco front and rear strut tower bars and a Cusco 2-point aluminum rear subframe brace
